title: Immersed with Guns
description: A mod you can use to simulate an FPS like experience, or just play vanilla minecraft with Guns!
body:
A modpack with guns. Its just regular vanilla minecraft but with guns, and also is optimized for play. This modpack combines [Simple Animated Guns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-simple-animated-guns) and [Immersive Guns](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-guns) to bring guns into minecraft!

This modpack is for people that want to just play vanilla minecraft, but with guns, there really isnt any other explanation.

Current supported versions
- 1.20.1

More versions coming soon.
